case_title: MORALES FERNANDO VS GUTIERREZ DAVID OLIVER DBA FENDER HOUSE AUTO WRECK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MORALES FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ DAVID OLIVER DBA FENDER HOUSE AUTO WRECK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ DAVID OLIVER DBA FENDER HOUSE AUTO WRECK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES FERNANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ DAVID OLIVER DBA FENDER HOUSE AUTO WRECK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
